daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launches and Aurora Opportunities on March 30, 2026

top_events.title: Kinetica 2 | Qingzhou Spacecraft Demo Flight
top_events.description: First test launch of CAS Space’s Kinetica-2 rocket and Qingzhou cargo resupply spacecraft for future cargo transport to the Chinese Tiangong Space Station.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Transporter 16 (Dedicated SSO Rideshare)
top_events.description: Dedicated rideshare flight to a sun-synchronous orbit with dozens of small microsatellites and nanosatellites for commercial and government customers.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Possible aurora at high latitudes with a Kp index of 4.67, best visible above 65° latitude.
top_events.action: Check conditions and prepare for viewing

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
